title: SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS=0 silently locks out all subscription purchases
description: main.rs:74-83 — SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS=0 is accepted at startup without error. At runtime, SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST validates duration_days > 0 (line 1885) then checks duration_days > max_days (line 1899). When max_days=0, any duration_days >= 1 fails with 'exceeds maximum allowed subscription length'. Combined with REQUIRE_SUBSCRIPTION=true, this produces a relay where no user can ever subscribe, authenticated users can't send messages, and there is no startup error to indicate misconfiguration. SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_ZATOSHI=0 is guarded with anyhow::bail\! for the analogous case (line 58-62); SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS=0 should be too.
